element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Foundation mechanic for all subsequent levels

element_introduction_order.element: Enemy creatures (soft blocks transform to eggs)
element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Creatures defeated become rideable allies with organic/mechanical types
Freed allies autonomously destroy soft blocks; two-player cooperative mechanic
Requires Power Glove item and two-player coordination (one player tosses other)
Boss-tier enemies with unique abilities; must be defeated before world boss

element_introduction_order.first_appears: Level 7 of each world alongside Four Bomber Kings
element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Secondary antagonist with unique ability; appears in champion/boss encounters
Final encounter per world; gate progression to next world
Enables progression through different eras; worlds 1-5 represent different time periods

typical_relief_triggers: Clearing level of all enemies to reveal goal
Successful bomb placement eliminating enemy clusters
Acquiring power-ups that extend bomb range or add utility
Reaching safe zones between enemy spawn areas
typical_tension_triggers: Encountering new enemy type without power-ups
Four Bomber Kings boss encounter at level 7
Confined spaces with limited bomb placement options
Explosion chain reactions from adjacent bombs
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: 8-level per-world structure with escalating difficulty: levels 1-6 introduce mechanics and challenge incrementally, level 7 introduces Four Bomber Kings and Great Bomber mini-boss, level 8 features world boss. Two-player cooperative option allows tension modulation. Battle Game modes provide alternative pacing (3-round Champion Mode, customizable Maniac Mode).

spatial_grammar.optional_content_signal: Secret warps accessible only with two-player cooperation (Power Glove toss mechanic) signal bonus content; cage placement indicates ally rescue opportunities
spatial_grammar.secret_convention: Warps hidden within level layouts; require specific two-player interaction pattern to access. Bonus stages accessed through warps provide secondary content.

difficulty_curve.early_game: World 1 introduces core mechanics (bomb placement, power-ups, basic enemies) in safe contexts. Levels 1-6 gradually layer complexity without overwhelming.
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Worlds 2-4 introduce creature types and ally mechanics. Encounter density and enemy variety increase. Four Bomber Kings encounters (level 7) establish skill gates.
difficulty_curve.late_game: World 5 and final encounters test mastery of all mechanics. Great Bomber appears alongside Four Bomber Kings. Boss encounters become complex patterns requiring precise bomb timing and movement.
notable_spikes: Level 7 of each world: Four Bomber Kings + Great Bomber introduction and escalating difficulty
Level 8 of each world: World boss pattern complexity
Champion Mode: Condensed Three-round gauntlet against Four Bomber Kings and Great Bomber
Creature type mastery: Organic vs. mechanical creatures have distinct behaviors introducing tactical decisions

notable_level_patterns.description: Each world's first six levels introduce enemy types, power-ups, and spatial challenges progressively. Soft block density and spawn frequency increase. Ally rescue cages appear intermittently.
Dedicated encounter with Four Bomber Kings and Great Bomber. These enemies have unique abilities and must be defeated to progress. Represents skill checkpoint before world boss.
Final level of each world features unique boss enemy. Culmination of that world's mechanics and difficulty. Clearing unlocks next world and allows revisit of previous world.
Warps accessed via two-player Power Glove toss mechanic. Bonus stages offer risk/reward gameplay separate from main progression.
Battle Royale supports 2-5 players (human/CPU) with team options. Champion Mode isolates boss encounters. Maniac Mode allows customization. Ten unique stages with password unlocks.
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Battle Game modes (separate from Normal Game)
